overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game showing the character walking through a detailed New York City street at night. The scene features urban architecture with mixed brick and stone buildings, street lighting, scattered pedestrians, and parked vehicles with a cinematic game engine aesthetic.

crosses from street corner onto sidewalk alongside basketball court

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man begins at a city street corner near a stop sign, crosses the asphalt crosswalk as a garbage truck passes by, and approaches a fenced basketball court. The scene features urban architecture with brick buildings and street lighting typical of a downtown night setting.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the enclosed sidewalk next to the basketball court, Spider-Man passes by a stone building entrance with weathered architectural details. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the path curves slightly through the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop area transitioning to street

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the street surface
passes parked SUV and approaches delivery truck

segments.scene_description: Continuing past the bus stop with its distinctive blue bench, Spider-Man moves from the concrete sidewalk onto the asphalt street. The segment features parked vehicles including an SUV and a large delivery truck ahead, with pedestrians visible on the distant sidewalks.

approaches intersection with green traffic light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks down the center of the street between parked cars toward an intersection with traffic signals

segments.scene_description: Walking down the center of the wide street, Spider-Man passes the delivery truck and approaches an intersection marked by a crosswalk and green traffic light. Neon signs with Asian characters illuminate the left side of the street while tall skyscrapers rise in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a detailed New York City street at night, transitioning from a quiet residential corner to a vibrant, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins at a street corner where Spider-Man crosses an asphalt crosswalk past a passing garbage truck and approaches a fenced basketball court. As he walks along the enclosed sidewalk, the camera passes weathered stone building entrances and oncoming pedestrians before the path curves toward a bus stop with a blue bench. The scene then shifts as he moves from the concrete sidewalk back onto the asphalt street, weaving past parked SUVs and a large delivery truck. Finally, the camera follows him down the center of the wide road toward a green traffic light, where the environment opens up to reveal glowing neon signs with Asian characters and towering skyscrapers in the distance.
